'''Caleb Hamlin-Uele''' (born 2 October 1999) is a New Zealand  professional [[rugby league]] [[footballer]] who plays as a {{rlp|pr}} for [[Wakefield Trinity]] in the [[Super League]].

==Background==
Caleb is the younger brother of [[Cronulla Sharks]] {{rlp|pr}} [[Braden Hamlin-Uele]].<ref>{{cite web|url=https://www.smh.com.au/sport/nrl/i-couldn-t-breathe-properly-cronulla-prop-s-covid-horror-20220318-p5a5rs.html |title='I couldn't breathe properly': Cronulla prop's COVID horror |publisher=Sydney Morning Herald |first=Christian |last=Nicolussi |date=19 March 2022}}</ref>

==Career==
===2025===
Hamlin-Uele made his debut in round 1 of the [[2025 Super League season]] for Trinity against the [[Leeds Rhinos]].<ref>{{cite web|url=https://www.superleague.co.uk/match-centre/report/43416 |title=Super League Match Report |publisher=Super League |date=15 February 2025}}</ref>
